task_completion.description: Access the JFrog Artifactory web interface.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A web browser is open and displaying the JFrog Artifactory UI, typically at http://localhost:8082.

task_completion.description: Open the client configuration or 'Set Me Up' tool for Maven.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Artifactory UI shows a 'Set Me Up' dialog, Application setup screen, or Maven configuration instructions.
The configuration tool explicitly shows 'example-repo-local' selected as the target repository for the generated snippet.

task_completion.description: Create or open the target file /home/ga/maven_settings.xml.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor (like nano, vim, gedit) or a terminal command (like cat or echo) is visible, explicitly writing to the path '/home/ga/maven_settings.xml'.

task_completion.description: Save the valid XML snippet containing the correct server and repository configuration.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The contents of /home/ga/maven_settings.xml are visible on screen, showing valid XML tags (e.g., <settings>, <servers>, <repositories>) and the repository URL containing 'artifactory/example-repo-local'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual Artifactory UI to get the configuration.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent navigating the JFrog Artifactory web interface to generate the snippet, rather than just typing a hardcoded XML file from memory.

integrity.description: Verify the agent genuinely created and saved the file in the environment.
integrity.visual_evidence: A real text editor or standard terminal command was used to write the file to the filesystem.

integrity.description: Verify the XML configuration uses the actual local Artifactory URL.
integrity.visual_evidence: The XML content should show the local Artifactory URL (e.g., referencing localhost:8082) as provided by the UI, not a generic placeholder like 'example.com'.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target JFrog Artifactory instance is running at http://localhost:8082. The agent must generate a Maven configuration for the repository 'example-repo-local'. The final output must be saved exactly at '/home/ga/maven_settings.xml'. The saved XML must contain the repository URL path 'artifactory/example-repo-local'.
